name: Mushrooms & Peas for Pasta or Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in olive oil.
2. Sautee mushrooms and peas for about 5 minutes.
3. Add wine and simmer for 5 minutes, then turn off the heat.
4. Stir in cream and half and half until well combined (do not cook cream or half and half on high heat as it will separate).
5. Cook pasta or rice according to package instructions and drain well but keep hot.
6. Mix with sauce and toss with 1/2 cup cheese. Serve hot with extra cheese on the side.
